title: Collect owner status updates for 7 overdue action items
description: Tracker went 21 days without updates; A-020, A-022, A-023, A-025, A-026, A-027, A-028 are all overdue with unverified status. Collect a one-line status + new due date from each owner (and the named individual behind each title) and report back so the Workflow Manager can restore accurate statuses. Priority order: A-023 (GA June 15), A-020 (runway), A-028/A-022 (Series B).
